candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over subtotal/total.

candidates.why: Direct match for cost of sales / direct production costs.

Added 'Other External Expenses' because it is a clear operating overhead bucket alongside 'Personnel Expenses'. Excluded depreciation/amortization, COGS, interest, and totals/subtotals. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other External Expenses

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure, narrower than total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: specific interest expense labels first, then broader financial expenses as fallback if that is all that is available in some years.

candidates.why: Equity total including minority interest; not preferred for BE because BE should exclude MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent company's shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferred owner/parent equity line visible in the balance sheet. Selected parent-only equity to avoid double counting minority interest in BE + MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to the parent company's shareholders

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Combined total, not a standalone minority-interest line.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest / non-controlling interests line is visible. Since parent equity is available for BE, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
